---
name: Media Transcription Issue
about: Track online/local video transcript extraction failures
title: "[media] "
labels: media-transcription
assignees: ""
---

## Source

- URL or local file:
- Platform:
- Expected output: TXT / SRT / JSON / summary

## Failure

Paste the short error summary only. Do not paste cookies or credentials.

## Evidence

- Output folder:
- `report.json`:
- `run_log.txt`:

## Fallback Decision

- [ ] Try URL extraction.
- [ ] Try exported `cookies.txt` if needed.
- [ ] Try local video fallback.
- [ ] Try CPU model if CUDA/cuBLAS fails.

## Safety

- [ ] No cookies, tokens, private browser data, or downloaded media committed.
- [ ] Outputs remain in the media tool folder.
